summary: Iteration 113: Testing MiraVoiceAssistant chat-style UI and WhatsApp Mira AI auto-responses. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: Code review verified all features.

minor.issue: Pattern matching has substring collision - 'membership' contains 'hi' which matches greeting pattern first. Recommend using word boundary matching.

verified_features.details: Component has message bubbles with user/mira roles, proper styling (purple for user, white for Mira), and smooth scrolling.
Input field at line 353-361 with placeholder 'Type a message...', Send button at line 384-388 with Send icon.
4 quick commands: Order treats, Book grooming, Next vaccination?, Soul score. Each has icon and colored background.
Volume button at lines 343-349 toggles isMuted state, shows VolumeX when muted, Volume2 when unmuted.
Mic button at lines 371-381 toggles speech recognition, shows MicOff when listening, Mic when idle.
Button at lines 620-628 with data-testid='navbar-mira-btn', opens Chatbase Mira chatbot.
Floating button at lines 406-421 with data-testid='mira-voice-button', positioned bottom-24 right-20.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Improve WhatsApp Mira pattern matching to use word boundaries instead of substring matching to avoid 'membership' matching 'hi' greeting pattern
critical_code_review_comments: WhatsApp pattern matching uses simple substring matching which can cause false positives (e.g., 'membership' contains 'hi'). Consider using regex word boundaries or checking for exact word matches.

test_credentials.note: WhatsApp API requires WHATSAPP_PHONE_NUMBER_ID and WHATSAPP_ACCESS_TOKEN to be configured for actual message sending. Pattern matching logic tested directly.

context_for_next_testing_agent: MiraVoiceAssistant has chat-style UI with: 1) Message bubbles (user=purple, mira=white), 2) Text input + send button, 3) Quick command chips (Order treats, Book grooming, Next vaccination?, Soul score), 4) Mute/unmute for voice, 5) Mic button for speech recognition. WhatsApp Mira has pattern matching for: greeting, order, grooming, vet, birthday, stay, membership, help, thanks, bye. Note: 'membership' pattern has collision with 'hi' greeting pattern due to substring matching.

features.text_input: Input field with 'Type a message...' placeholder
features.send_button: Send icon button, disabled when empty

endpoints./api/whatsapp/webhook: GET for verification, POST for incoming messages

mocked_api.note: WhatsApp API requires real credentials for message sending. Pattern matching and response generation tested directly.
